name: Biscotti 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Roast almonds for 10-15 minutes, or until lightly browned.
3. Let almonds cool to room temperature.
4. In a large bowl, mix together all dry ingredients except one cup of flour. Set aside.
5. Lightly beat eggs and vanilla in a separate bowl.
6. Add the egg mixture to the dry ingredients and stir until combined.
7. If necessary, add the reserved dry ingredients to achieve a dough-like consistency.
8. Stir in the nuts until evenly distributed.
9. Divide the dough into three equal parts.
10. Shape each part into slabs about 1 inch wide and 12-14 inches long.
11. Place the slabs on a lightly oiled baking sheet.
12. Bake at 300°F for 50 minutes, or until golden brown.
13. Let cool on a rack for 5 minutes.
14. Cut diagonal bars about 1/2 inch thick.
15. Lay cookies flat and return to oven for another 50 minutes.
16. Store in a paper bag for up to 5-6 days before serving.
Note: The success of the recipe depends on proper mixing technique and flour quality. If the dough is too crumbly, try again with adjustments as needed.
